200# return «
choose a throne:

Event: Royal Challenge - Season 30
Event Date: 01/10/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A9
Poison Flower

An acid orb travels across the battlefield. When the acid orb passes through allies, it restores 200000 health and removes 2 debuffs. When the acid orb passes through enemies, it covers the affected units with acid. The units covered in acid take 200000 magic damage for 3 sec. The acid corrodes their armor, reducing it by 15% per second for a total of 3 sec. When the armor reduction reaches 45%, the effect lasts for another 2 sec. Also, the affected enemies have a 35% chance to get covered in jelly for 3 sec. During this time, they can’t attack or move, and take 35% more damage. When the ability wears off, the jelly explodes and sticks to 2 nearest enemies for 3 sec. Their attack speed is reduced by 30%, and they have a 45% chance to miss their target on attack.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
